title: Ultimate Holidays in Taiwan 2026
details: Highlights: Kaohsiung, Alishan Mountain & Forest Walk, Forest Rail Train, Sun Moon Lake Boat Tour, Wenwu Temple, Nantou Tea Farm, Taichung Night Market, Taipei 101 (photo stop), Vigor Pineapple Cake DIY, Jade Handcraft Center, Ximending Shopping District, and Fo Guang Shan Buddha Museum.

itinerary.day_details: Arrival at Taoyuan International Airport. Proceed to Kaohsiung. Lunch en route. Visit Fo Guang Shan Buddha Museum. Dinner and hotel check-in in Kaohsiung. Flight: MNL–TPE 5J312 07:05–09:25.
Breakfast at hotel. Travel to Alishan. Experience Alishan Mountain and Forest Walk and ride the Forest Rail Train. Lunch and dinner included. Check-in at hotel in Chiayi.
Breakfast at hotel. Visit Sun Moon Lake with boat tour. Stop at Wenwu Temple and Nantou Tea Farm. Explore Taichung Night Market. Check-in at Taichung hotel.

Breakfast at hotel and check-out. Proceed to Taipei. Visit Vigor Pineapple Cake DIY, Taipei 101 (without observatory), Jade Handcraft Center, and Ximending Shopping District. Lunch at own expense. Transfer to airport.
Arrival back in Manila. Flight: TPE–MNL 5J311 02:15–04:40. Home sweet home!

extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱11,000/person initial downpayment to guarantee reservation.
Remaining balance payable 45 days before travel date.
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
